channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: Today’s Wordle #1754: Hints and Answer for April 8, 2026
item.content:encoded:
Today’s tips and strategies can help you solve it faster and maintain your streak—if you’re open to a little extra help. So, if you’ve found yourself stuck with today’s Wordle, don’t worry, below you’ll find some helpful hints and even the answer for Wordle Game #1754 for April 8, 2026

To play today’s Wordle, head to the game’s website. If you want to go right to today’s answer without any tips or tricks, you can click right here.

IMPORTANT: The following information includes spoilers on today’s and yesterday’s editions of Wordle. If you don’t want the answer given to you, stop scrolling.

How To Play Wordle

Wordle is a simple but addictive word puzzle. Each day, players have to guess a five-letter word answer in no more than six attempts. After each guess:

  • Green letters are correct and in the right position.
  • Yellow letters are correct, but in the wrong position.
  • Gray letters are not in the word at all.

The goal is to guess the word in as few tries as possible. Daily puzzles keep players coming back for more, making it a fun brain exercise and a popular online trend.

Wordle can only be played on the New York Times website. There is currently no app for you to download the official game.

Wordle Hints For Today, April 8, 2026

Yet again, the Wordle answer for game #1754 is a tough one. According to the NY Times Wordle review, today’s answer takes an average of 4.8 out of 6 guesses. That makes it just barely harder than the 4.7-guess average from April 7.

General Wordle Hints For April 8

Without giving today’s Wordle answer completely away, here are a few helpful hints for today to get you started:

  • Hint 1: It refers to a narrow body of water connected to a larger one.
  • Hint 2: You’re most likely to find it along a coastline or near the ocean.
  • Hint 3: It often serves as a small passage where water flows inward.
  • Hint 4: It’s commonly used in geographic or nautical contexts

Use these clues to narrow down your guesses and increase your chances of solving Wordle #1754 for April 8, 2026.

Starter Words For April 8, 2026

If you want help getting started without having today’s Wordle answer given to you, there are a few starter words worth trying that will help you figure out some included letters. A few starter words that may help are:

  • LITEN
  • INTEL
  • INERT
  • SLANT

Today’s Wordle Answer For Game #1754 On April 8, 2026

If you’ve tried everything, including using the above hints, and are still stuck, you can find the answer to today’s Wordle below.

Answer: INLET

If you solved today’s Wordle without our answer, congratulations! If not, take note of the best tips above for tomorrow’s puzzle, and check back daily for more hints.

What Does Today’s Wordle Answer Mean?

INLET is a noun and a verb. As a noun, it means “an indentation of a shoreline, usually long and narrow; small bay or arm.” When used as a verb, with an object, it means “to put in; insert.”

Yesterday’s Wordle Answer

If you missed the previous game, here’s yesterday’s Wordle answer for Game #1753 on April 7, 2026

Answer: DENSE

While not always the case, looking at previous words can sometimes give you insight into common patterns or letter usage in Wordle puzzles.

When Is The Next Wordle Game After #1754?

Wordle games are updated daily at 12 am or Midnight in your respective time zone. Information about the next game is often available in the hours before to give players a heads up. The game on April 9 will be Wordle Game #1755.

What Is Wordle?

Wordle is a daily word puzzle created by Josh Wardle. Initially developed as a prototype in 2013, it wasn’t fully released until 2021. The game challenges players to guess a five-letter word in six tries or fewer, using hints from each attempt to narrow down the answer. Its straightforward concept, accessibility, and the thrill of solving a new puzzle each day helped it surge in popularity by late 2021. The success of Wordle inspired numerous spin-offs and social media challenges, leading to its acquisition by The New York Times in early 2022.

For even more Insider Gaming delivered straight to your inbox, sign up for our weekly newsletter

Mike has been covering the gaming industry since 2012, and has reported on some of the largest events in the industry while also working as an investigative reporter. Outside of…

More from Mike Straw

MOBILE APP

item.title: Elden Ring Movie Reportedly Secures Last of Us Actor
item.content:encoded:
Alex Garland’s Elden Ring movie adaptation has reportedly cast The Last of Us’ Nick Offerman.

We have learned several details about the upcoming Elden Ring movie since its confirmation, including that Alex Garland wrote 160 pages to pitch it and that the director also became a pro at the game. However, we have now received more concrete details, including some cast members of the film.

Alex Garland’s Elden Ring Reportedly Features Nick Offerman

A new report by World of Reel states that Alex Garland’s Elden Ring movie will begin production this week, and “Nick Offerman has joined the cast in Scotland.” Nick Offerman is a highly popular name in the industry, having worked on series like Parks and Recreation and movies like The Founder and Civil War. Offerman has recently worked on a game adaptation as well, portraying Bill in HBO’s live-action adaptation of The Last of Us.

Moreover, the report also states that Offerman will be joining the likes of Kit Connor (Rocketman), Ben Whishaw (James Bond movies), and Cailee Spaeny (Civil War) in the upcoming movie, with more announcements seemingly arriving “in the coming days.” Other than that, no plot details or other announcements, such as the release window, have been officially revealed for the movie.

In other news, Group SNE is adapting another video game into a tabletop RPG, and it’s none other than FromSoftware’s Elden Ring Nightreign. Additionally, there’s a 400-page book that players can read to explore the game’s lore in greater detail. What are your thoughts on Nick Offerman being cast in Alex Garland’s Elden Ring movie? Leave your thoughts down in the comments, and join the official Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more information from Insider Gaming, read about members of Sony’s beta program reporting that a new PlayStation 5 UI is being tested. Don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

MOBILE APP

item.title: Pokémon Champions Mobile Release Period Revealed
item.content:encoded:
Pokémon Champions is a brand-new IP for The Pokémon Company’s ever-growing list of franchises and new releases. Not content with the mountain of IPs it already has, the world-famous company has partnered up with new developer The Pokémon Works, and, aptly, the Pokémon Champions mobile release date is in the works—and more.

2026 has already seen Pokémon Pokopia dominate sales and everyone’s free time. Why not throw another spanner in the works with Pokémon Champions? We’ve known for some time key details about the game, including its price and free-to-play status, as well as its main platforms.

If you want Pokémon Champions on mobile, you won’t have to wait much longer.

Pokémon Korea Website Secretly Announces Champions Mobile Release Date

The Korean Pokémon Champions website has advertised the game for mobile platforms in June 2026!

Initial release details were only available for the Nintendo Switch, but this rather low-key reveal means Champions is coming to mobile a mere two months after the console launch.

Centro leaks showed off the launch details, and as far as everyone knows, it’s going to be the same game, just in a slick and comfortable handheld form.

Insider Gaming will update you closer to June 2026 when the curtain is finally pulled back on the exact release date window. Keep checking back for more updates.

Are you hopping straight into Pokémon Champions on April 8? Or will you hold off another couple of months to enjoy the experience from scratch on your phone? Share your thoughts and feedback via the Insider Gaming Discord.

Read about Sony beta testing a new PlayStation 5 UI and the main protagonist in Rockstar Games’ canceled Agent reportedly being revealed for more news here at Insider Gaming.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android

item.title: PlayStation Announces The Playerbase, a New Way to Get Fans Into Games
item.content:encoded:
PlayStation has announced a new community program called The Playerbase, which will bring select fans into PlayStation Studios’ games.

The announcement of The Playerbase comes close to a year after their loyalty program, PlayStation Stars, announced a shutdown. Now, the new program is very different and much more inclusive for players, as it’s not just about creating an avatar for a player around a game, but about actually creating characters that will be available in games, starting with Gran Turismo.

PlayStation’s The Playerbase Will Start by Putting Select Players in Gran Turismo 7

A new blog post reveals details on PlayStation’s new community program, The Playerbase. The program will scan the selected player’s likeness and have them appear in a PlayStation game. The first game included in the program is Gran Turismo 7, and players from select markets in the Americas, Europe, Asia, South Africa, and Australia can submit their applications through this website starting April 7, 7:00 AM PDT.

The application will require players to answer some questions, sign in with their PlayStation account ID, and share additional information to participate. There will be a review process, after which a number of finalists will be invited to video interviews to discuss their connection with PlayStation. Out of the finalists, one PlayStation fan will be selected to be featured in Gran Turismo 7.

PlayStation’s Playerbase will provide players “a special limited-time appearance as an in-game character portrait, similar to how characters are presented throughout the game.” The fan will also help “design a custom Fantasy Logo and a one-of-a-kind vehicle livery which will be added permanently to the Showcase menu.” The fan will have to visit the visual arts studio in Los Angeles to be scanned and collaborate with a designer for the logo and livery.

Over time, the program will add more games from PlayStation Studios and more fans as the Playerbase program expands.

In other news, Sony has had another round of removals for shovelware games on PlayStation Store, with Jesus Simulator delisted. Additionally, PlayStation games on PC took three years to earn $300 million. What are your thoughts on PlayStation’s The Playerbase program? Will you submit an application? Leave your thoughts down in the comments, and join the official Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more information from Insider Gaming, read about Xbox Game Pass titles for April 2026 Wave 1. Don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Available on iOS & Android

item.title: Xbox Game Pass April Wave 1 Includes Hades 2 & Replaced
item.content:encoded:
The first wave of titles coming to Xbox Game Pass in April has been announced, and it features over 15 titles for the gaming service. Highlights include the console release of Hades 2, as well as the day-one arrival of Replaced.

It doesn’t just stop there, though, as major titles like Call of Duty: Modern Warfare, DayZ, and Oblivion are also joining the service across its various tiers in what is one of the biggest monthly drops in a while.

Hades 2 & Replaced Coming To Game Pass

Announced as usual on the Xbox Wire, Hades 2 and Replaced are two of the 17 titles joining Xbox Game Pass during the month of April.

Take a look at all the games coming this month below, alongside the dates they’ll become available and the required subscription tiers:

Xbox Game Pass Removals April 15

As ever, the arrival of new games to the Game Pass line-up means some must leave the catalogue, with five titles leaving the service on April 15. These are:

  • Ashen (Cloud, Console, PC)
  • Eiyuden Chronicle: Hundred Heroes (Cloud, Console, PC)
  • Grand Theft Auto 5 (Cloud, Console, PC)
  • My Little Pony: A Zephyr Heights Mystery (Cloud, Console, PC)
  • Terra Invicta (Game Preview)(PC)

Which titles will you be trying from the latest Xbox Game Pass additions? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more gaming news, check out the rumours surrounding a Tomb Raider Legacy Of Atlantis delay, as well as development for Star Wars Eclipse moving very slowly.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

item.title: Lewd Resident Evil Requiem Leon Merchandise Is Breaking The Internet
item.content:encoded:
Resident Evil Requiem tells a great story that flip-flops between Grace and Leon, but many in the Resi community don’t care and have instead become enamored by Leon’s hulking body in the 2026 release. New Requiem merch plays into this thirst and reveals a new side of Leon or two.

Leon’s involvement in Requiem was the hot topic for a long time. He was finally locked in for Requiem during The Game Awards 2026, and come release day, it was hard to look past one thing: His body. The former RPD officer has clearly been on the Chris Redfield regime, and now you can ogle him in real-life!

Resident Evil Requiem Statue Reveals A Lot Of Leon Kennedy

orzGK has a line of Resident Evil Requiem merchandise, including statues of Leon. His version A and C models are quite safe for work, and feature Leon tied to a chair—reminiscent of the scene featuring himself and Victor Gideon—wearing his default tight shirt and holster.

The ‘swimsuit’ models are slightly more…revealing.

Here, Leon is still tied to the chair, but he’s now down to his boxers and nothing else. Both variations feature a smaller model and a bigger version, and the most expensive price tag will set you back about $300.

Nowhere on the page does it mention Capcom, meaning this is likely unofficial Resident Evil merchandise. It certainly brings back the shock of that unofficial Tifa Lockhart statue from the Final Fantasy Remake—you know which one it is!

Will you be buying either of the Leon statues to add to your collection? Is the thirst real? Share your thoughts on these collectibles through the Insider Gaming Discord.

There’s much more news to read here, including the main protagonist in Rockstar Games’ canceled Agent potentially being revealed, and a Tomb Raider Legacy of Atlantis delay rumour surfacing online.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Available on iOS & Android

item.title: Tomb Raider Legacy of Atlantis Delay Rumour Surfaces Online
item.content:encoded:
A new rumor has surfaced online, stating that Tomb Raider: Legacy of Atlantis will be delayed to 2027.

Tomb Raider: Legacy of Atlantis was announced at The Game Awards 2025, with the remake of the hit 1996 title set to arrive in 2026. However, since the initial announcement, we haven’t really seen anything more about the game, and it looks like it could be delayed, but players should take this information with a huge grain of salt.

Tomb Raider: Legacy of Atlantis Rumored to be Delayed to February 2027

The rumor about the release date delay for Tomb Raider: Legacy of Atlantis comes from the Society of Raiders’ latest X post (formerly Twitter). The same user had stated that a remake of Tomb Raider (1996) would be announced at The Game Awards on December 11. Their latest post says, “Tomb Raider: Legacy of Atlantis is rumored to be released in February 2027.” However, they have clarified that they can share the source for “obvious reasons,” which is why “it’s marked as a rumor and not a fact.”

Crystal Dynamics has yet to confirm the delay officially. All that players have been informed about the game since the reveal is that the developers will adjust and evolve the experience to suit modern player tastes. At the same time, it will have puzzles, combat, traversal, big rolling balls, and death-defying action, and other things “that you expect in a Tomb Raider game are going to be there in spades”, said Will Kerslake.

In other news, Tomb Raider: Catalyst developers have revealed players don’t need to do any homework before jumping in. Additionally, Crystal Dynamics announced a new round of layoffs in 2026. What are your thoughts on the rumor about Tomb Raider: Legacy of Atlantis being delayed to 2027? Leave your thoughts down in the comments, and join the official Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more information from Insider Gaming, read about the main protagonist from the canceled Agent game by Rockstar. Don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

MOBILE APP
